output.level_rationale: Role title is "Integration Operations Program Manager" at Plaid with no years required, management scope, or reporting line stated. Company stage is marked unknown. Title alone suggests L4–L5 scope (manager-level ownership), but JD content is unreadable. Without clarity on whether this is a strategic platform role or a tactical program-execution seat, confidence in level is low.
output.summary: Integration Operations Program Manager at Plaid, Strategy & Operations department. Candidate brings eight years of global commercial operations and transformation program leadership at Google with strong cross-functional stakeholder management and process design skills. However, the JD appears corrupted/unreadable (cached HTML boilerplate), making role scope assessment impossible. Candidate has no evident integrations/API platform or fintech domain background; transfer value depends on whether role is strategic or heavily tactical. Family fit is moderate given Operations title but uncertain domain and execution emphasis. Recommend retrieving clean JD before proceeding.
